zh.Emyngton, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾明頓
zh.Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾維格莫 卡素
zh.Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Mortimer於1292年出生在英國賀福爾維格莫 卡素時，她的父親Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk36歲，母親Lucy de la Wafre33歲。她和Andrew Sackville至少有1個兒子。她去世於1319年4月10日在英國斯塔福爾阿頓享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Mortimer于1292年出生在英国賀福爾維格莫 卡素时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk36岁，母亲Lucy de la Wafre33岁。她和Andrew Sackville至少有1个儿子。她去世于1319年4月10日在英国斯塔福爾阿頓享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Mortimer was born in 1292, in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, her father, Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk, was 36 and her mother, Lucy de la Wafre, was 33. She had at least 1 son with Andrew Sackville. She died on 10 April 1319, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Mortimer est née en 1292, à Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lucy de la Wafre, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Andrew Sackville. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1319, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Mortimer 1292 in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk 36 und ihre Mutter Lucy de la Wafre 33. Sie hatte mit Andrew Sackville mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 10. April 1319 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Alton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Mortimer è nata il nel 1292 nel Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lucy de la Wafre, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Andrew Sackville. Morì il 10 aprile 1319, nel Alton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Mortimerが1292年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー カストルで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirkは36歳，母Lucy de la Wafreは33歳であった。彼女はAndrew Sackvilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1319年4月10日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Mortimer(이)가 1292년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy de la Wafre(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Andrew Sackville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 4월 10일 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Mortimer nasceu em 1292, em Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de la Wafre, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Andrew Sackville. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1319, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Mortimer родилась в 1292 г. в местности вигмор кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de la Wafre, 33. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Andrew Sackville. Она умерла 10 апреля 1319 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Mortimer nació en 1292, en Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lucy de la Wafre, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Andrew Sackville. Murió el 10 de abril de 1319, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
